comment_about_this_file: Most of Vercel's Next.js wiring is auto-detected — this file only locks down the parts where defaults bite us.
_: regions: arrange the route handlers close to the backend (Frankfurt = Render's EU region). Pages still render from the user's nearest edge; this only affects route.ts handlers and SSR.
_2: Route-handler config: increase max duration for the agent endpoints since they wait on Gemini + Cohere + the backend. Vercel Hobby caps at 60s, Pro at 300s — our 180s ceiling fits both as long as Gemini cooperates.
